frames.name: Military Operations Focus
frames.description: Presents the conflict primarily through the lens of military casualties, operational details, and strategic objectives
frames.emphasis: U.S. service member deaths, operational chaos, military achievements like killing Iranian leaders

frames.name: Humanitarian Crisis Frame
frames.description: Centers civilian casualties and humanitarian impact as the primary concern
frames.emphasis: Civilian death tolls, attacks on schools and hospitals, humanitarian consequences

frames.name: Political Consequences Frame
frames.description: Focuses on domestic political implications and public opinion regarding the conflict
frames.emphasis: Trump's approval ratings, polling on public support for strikes, political costs of casualties

outlierPerspectives: Detailed documentation of specific civilian casualties with named locations and victim counts (Vox's focus on the Minab school strike killing 175 people)
Analysis of friendly fire incidents and operational chaos (Axios's reporting on Kuwaiti forces shooting down U.S. jets)
Polling data showing only 25% American support for the strikes (Foreign Policy's Reuters/Ipsos poll)
missingContext: What precipitated this military operation - the original justification or triggering events
International diplomatic responses beyond Gulf state retaliation
Economic implications and oil market impacts
Congressional authorization or legal framework for the operation
Comparison to previous U.S.-Iran military engagements
Regional allies' positions beyond Kuwait's friendly fire incident
